'''mashoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:izard|izard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:izard|izard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mashoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæshereth|mæshereth]] || [[word:mæsherej|mæsherej]] || [[word:mæsheresh|mæsheresh]] || [[word:mæshere|mæshere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashoshoroth|mashoshoroth]] || [[word:mashoshoroj|mashoshoroj]] || [[word:mashoshorosh|mashoshorosh]] || [[word:mashoshoro|mashoshoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashoroth|mashoroth]] || [[word:mashoroj|mashoroj]] || [[word:mashorosh|mashorosh]] || [[word:mashoro|mashoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashofroth|mashofroth]] || [[word:mashofroj|mashofroj]] || [[word:mashofrosh|mashofrosh]] || [[word:mashofrof|mashofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mashorotho|mashorotho]] || [[word:mashorojo|mashorojo]] || [[word:mashorosho|mashorosho]] || [[word:mashoroko|mashoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mashoroth|mashoroth]] || [[word:mashoroj|mashoroj]] || [[word:mashorosh|mashorosh]] || [[word:mashoro|mashoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mashorothol|mashorothol]] || [[word:mashorojol|mashorojol]] || [[word:mashoroshol|mashoroshol]] || [[word:mashorokol|mashorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mashorothotho|mashorothotho]] || [[word:mashorojojo|mashorojojo]] || [[word:mashoroshosho|mashoroshosho]] || [[word:mashoroko|mashoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mashorothon|mashorothon]] || [[word:mashorojon|mashorojon]] || [[word:mashoroshon|mashoroshon]] || [[word:mashorokon|mashorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mashorothoro|mashorothoro]] || [[word:mashorojoro|mashorojoro]] || [[word:mashoroshoro|mashoroshoro]] || [[word:mashorokoro|mashorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
